name: 24H Stories: Midnight Channel
short_description: Control two victims, survive the night filled with the tolling of church bells.
detailed_description:
Introduction


Utilize items and skills to battle cultists in isolation. As the story unfolds, conspiracies hidden beneath the night will gradually come to light.

Content


  • Exploration: Control the character in third person perspective to explore maps, discover puzzles, and solve them.
  • Battle: Engage in combat with enemies in first person perspective. Properly combining skills will increase your chances of survival.
  • Planning: Discover items and skills, upgrade them, and choose the most reasonable combinations.
  • Side Quests: Non-compulsory side quests that you can completely ignore despite the screams in your ears.
  • Puzzle solving: Utilize tools in hand to solve the troubles encountered.
  • Mild Horror: Experience horror stories in a town full of eerie events.
  • Save Function: The game automatically saves progress according to chapters.
